prompt: Build a proposal draft detail card with owner, status, due date, and private review notes.
List the proposals waiting for review and let me sort them by owner or due date.
Build a proposal review board that groups items into draft, in review, and approved.
Build an owner capacity dashboard for my booking service that shows afternoon slowdowns, queue pressure, and recommended changes before it gets worse.
Create a service migration planning workspace that compares target nodes, cutover steps, risks, and uptime safeguards for moving an overloaded service.
Build a priority-access pricing planner that ties paid fast-lane options to measured demand, queue pressure, and infrastructure cost.
Create a node upgrade comparison panel that evaluates staying local, moving to a stronger node, or splitting the service into a dedicated node.
I need a private workspace where I can draft a proposal before sharing it with my team.
Build a shared proposal review workspace where my team can critique each other's drafts.
Three teams need to coordinate on one deliverable. Build a shared meeting-room style workspace for that handoff.
Build a promotion workflow that turns my private availability tracker into a client-facing booking module with publish controls and boundary settings.
I'm a massage therapist. Build a booking module that shows my available times, services, rates, and location.
Link my booking module to payments so clients pay when they book, and connect confirmed bookings to my review flow.
Create a booking intake bridge that turns session inquiries into prefilled booking records and routes them into my scheduling workflow automatically.
Build a local resume editor that helps me compose a polished one-page resume with structured sections and export options.
Create a personal daily work command center with calendar, tasks, contacts, notes, and daily priorities in one place.
Build a rapid data-entry table for structured rows like expenses, time logs, or counts, with simple totals and export.
Create a personal job search tracker with one Kanban board, structured application cards, follow-up dates, and local storage.
Build a small-business customer tracker with contacts, follow-up dates, invoices, and due items in one local workspace.
Create a local software inventory tracker for apps, subscriptions, internal modules, and node services with version details, categories, owners, and reports.
Build a grant-writing workspace with section templates, drafting guidance, a reference directory, and export for the final proposal.
Create a local invoicing tool for a small business that lets me make invoices, record payments, and track unpaid balances.
Build an employee shift scheduler for a small business with weekly schedules, hour totals, searchable history, and shareable or printable exports.
Create a local inventory-control module that tracks stock counts, costs, selling prices, purchases, sales, and period reports.
Build a local time-tracking and invoicing module that logs billable hours, generates invoices, and tracks payment status.
Create a local decision-table editor for small business rules, with fact definitions, rule validation, and a simple test harness.
Build a local survey data collector with a form builder, response entry, basic analytics, and CSV import/export.
Build a lightweight workflow tool that lets non-technical users create a simple form, connect it to one action, and view results.
Create a bounded low-code builder for internal business tools, modnet modules, or service nodes with visual design, simple scripting, and local data connections.
Create a starter shell for a bounded internal workflow tool with navigation, a shared layout, intake form, and built-in help surface.
Build a proposal review card with owner, due date, status, reviewer notes, and quick approve or request-changes actions.
Create an availability-slot editor where I define bookable times, service length, buffers, and blackout periods.
Build a customer record card with contact info, invoice status, follow-up date, and service history.
Create a reusable invoice line-item editor with description, quantity, unit rate, tax handling, and subtotal preview.
Build a capacity pressure panel for a service node that shows demand spikes, queue length, and suggested upgrade options.
